criteria.name: Python data analysis
criteria.description: Evidence of using Python to inspect, transform, or analyze datasets.
positive_signals: Connects Python tools to a concrete dataset or analysis workflow
negative_signals: Lists Python without project or coursework context

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: SQL or database familiarity
criteria.description: Evidence of querying, joining, filtering, or organizing structured data.
positive_signals: Mentions specific query or data retrieval work

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Statistics and probability foundation
criteria.description: Evidence of statistical reasoning, probability, regression, or inference coursework.
positive_signals: Explains assumptions, uncertainty, or model limitations
negative_signals: Uses statistical terms without applied context

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Machine learning project evidence
criteria.description: Evidence of applying a model or baseline method to a dataset.
positive_signals: Connects data, method, evaluation, and result
negative_signals: Broad machine learning claim without implementation detail

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Data cleaning and preprocessing
criteria.description: Evidence of handling missing values, inconsistent formats, or feature preparation.
positive_signals: Describes a concrete data quality issue and action taken
negative_signals: Claims cleaned data without saying what was cleaned

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Data visualization and communication
criteria.description: Evidence of communicating data insights through charts, dashboards, reports, or presentations.
positive_signals: Connects analysis output to an audience or decision
negative_signals: Mentions visualization tools with no communication outcome

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Model evaluation
criteria.description: Evidence of using suitable metrics or validation methods for a model or baseline.
positive_signals: Explains evaluation choice without overstating results
negative_signals: Reports metrics without dataset or validation context

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Measurable project impact when user-provided
criteria.description: Uses metrics only when the applicant provides evidence and context.
positive_signals: Metric is tied to user-provided evidence
negative_signals: Invented percentage, rank, or performance improvement

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: ATS readability and truthfulness risk
criteria.description: Uses clear role keywords and flags claims that lack evidence.

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

notes: Static v0 profile with manually curated public role-fit indicators. It does not represent private employer rules.
